$translator_note: This file is a reference translation. The Japanese (ja.json) edition is the authoritative version for legal documents like the DISCLAIMER. Account names, ledger items, and .xtx output remain in Japanese (tax-law requirement).
not_found_body: The page you are looking for does not exist. Please check the URL.
error_boundary_body: An error occurred while rendering the screen. Your saved data (in the browser's IndexedDB) is unaffected. Reloading usually recovers it.
error_banner_message: An error occurred. Your last action may not have completed correctly.
common_file_too_large: File is too large ({size}, limit {limit}). Stopped to keep the browser from freezing.
cloud_send_confirm_desc_html: This data (receipt image / CSV rows) will be sent to {host}. It is handled per the destination's privacy policy and your API plan. Free tiers may be used for model training; a paid-tier API key is recommended for sensitive receipts. Proceed?
attachment_confirm_desc: This photo will be attached as supporting evidence. Once the entry is confirmed it cannot be replaced or deleted (required for record integrity). Please confirm it is clear and matches the correct transaction.
backup_notice_unsupported: ⚠ This browser does not support automatic backups. Please download JSON regularly from Settings.
backup_notice_opfs_stale_never: ⚠ Saving to OPFS only and JSON has never been downloaded. All data will be lost if the browser is cleared.
backup_notice_opfs_stale_days: ⚠ Saving to OPFS only and no JSON download for {days} days. All data will be lost if the browser is cleared.
update_available_hint: If you are entering a journal entry, consider updating on next launch.
disclaimer_intro_html: Please review the Disclaimer below before use. (The Japanese version is the authoritative version; this translation is for reference only.)
disclaimer_prototype_subtitle: Use for actual tax filings is at the user's own risk.
disclaimer_bullet_accuracy_html: Output values and .xtx files are not guaranteed to be accurate. Verify final figures with your tax accountant / tax office.
disclaimer_bullet_tax_law_html: Tax law and bookkeeping requirements are revised annually. The bundled tax-schema/ may not reflect the latest National Tax Agency announcements — it is the user's responsibility to verify.
disclaimer_bullet_xtx_html: .xtx output covers the business part (financial statements + business income/blue-return deduction on the return). Before any actual filing, always load it into e-Tax software (download edition) and review the content. Complete income deductions and tax in e-Tax. Accuracy is not guaranteed.
disclaimer_bullet_llm_html: When using LLM classification or OCR, CSV rows and receipt images are sent to Google Gemini. Please confirm before sending sensitive information.
disclaimer_bullet_storage_html: Data is stored in the browser's IndexedDB. It will be lost if the browser cache is cleared. Backup is the user's responsibility.
disclaimer_bullet_liability_html: The developer is not liable for any damages arising from final returns, amended returns, or tax audits.
disclaimer_accept_button: I understand and agree — let me start
backup_panel_intro_fsa_html: Once you point at an iCloud Drive / Google Drive Desktop / Dropbox sync folder, aoiko-ledger-YYYY-MM-DD.zip (ledger data + receipt photos) will be written automatically on every change.
backup_panel_intro_opfs_html: This browser cannot write to external folders, so backups go to the browser sandbox (OPFS). Clearing browser data will erase them; press "Download backup" below regularly and save to iCloud Drive or similar.
backup_panel_intro_none: This browser does not support automatic backups. Use "Download backup" frequently.
backup_panel_include_api_keys_warning: When off (the default), your API keys are not written to backup or exported JSON. This keeps plaintext API keys from leaking into cloud-synced folders. Turn it on only if you want to carry the keys over too, e.g. when migrating to another device.
home_recent_empty: No entries yet this month. Want to write your first one?
journal_list_subtitle: Browse all confirmed and reversed entries by year and month
journal_list_empty: No entries match your filters. Try a different combination.
journal_list_reverse_confirm_desc: A reversing entry with debits and credits swapped will be created with today's date, and the original entry will be marked “Reversed”. Both entries are retained as history (required by Japan's Electronic Books Preservation Act).
import_subtitle: Create journal entries in bulk from a bank or credit-card transaction CSV
import_duplicate_error: This file was already imported on {date} ({name})
import_no_api_key: Gemini API key is not set. Register it under Settings → LLM integration.
import_step_review: 3. Choose the counterpart account for each row
import_overlap_notice: Auto-excluded {count} row(s) that may duplicate a previous import. Review and uncheck Skip if needed.
import_invoice_compliant_title: A qualified invoice is on file. Eligible for 100% input tax credit under the standard method.
import_history_subtitle: List of past CSV imports and batch reversal
import_history_reverse_confirm_desc: All active entries in this batch will be marked “Reversed”. A reversing entry will be created for each; both will be retained as history.
receipt_subtitle: Extract transaction info from a receipt image → confirm → save as a journal entry (choose engine in Settings: cloud LLM, local LLM, or purely-local Tesseract)
receipt_local_engine_notice: Result from purely-local OCR (Tesseract). Accuracy is limited; please verify and correct the total, date and vendor before saving. OCR raw text is shown on screen only, not stored.
receipt_amount_required: Please enter the total amount (positive integer).
order_subtitle: Paste a full Amazon / 楽天 order page; an LLM extracts the line items → review → save as a journal entry. Resilient to site UI changes (no DOM scraping).
order_paste_placeholder: Select all on the order page (Cmd+A), copy (Cmd+C), then paste. Headers and recommendation noise are OK; the LLM will ignore them.
order_total_mismatch: Item subtotal does not match the total (items {itemSum} / total {total}). Trust the total and continue?
order_amount_required: Please verify the order date and total amount.
order_no_items: No items to save (both description and amount are required).
reports_subtitle: Monthly sales and P/L (per fiscal year)
reports_pl_inventory_suggestion_hint: Use this figure to journal the ending inventory (account 5030) yourself — it isn't posted automatically.
reports_bs_imbalance_warning: ⚠ Assets total {assets} does not match Liabilities+Equity total {liabEquity}. Journal entries may be inconsistent.
reports_trend_error_range: End year must not be before start year
reports_trend_error_too_many: You can analyze at most {max} years at once
reports_amendment_no_change: No difference between the filed snapshot and the current data. An amended return is not required.
reports_amendment_has_change: ⚠ Journal entries have changed since filing. This is subject to an amended return.
reports_amendment_checklist_unlock_detai: Press “Unlock” under Settings → Reports. The filed snapshot is retained as history.
reports_amendment_checklist_reverse_deta: Press “Reverse” on the original entry to create a reversing entry, then add a correct new entry. Originals are kept with status=reversed and never deleted (Electronic Books Preservation Act).
reports_amendment_checklist_review_label: Review the amended P/L and balance sheet
reports_amendment_checklist_review_detai: In Reports, verify that revenue, expenses, and net income after the corrections match expectations.
reports_amendment_checklist_submit_label: Submit the amended return via e-Tax
reports_amendment_checklist_submit_detai: Create and submit the amended return in e-Tax software (download edition) or the online preparation corner (income-tax amended returns are not supported in the web edition). The current .xtx output of this tool is intended for original filings only.
reports_amendment_checklist_relock_detai: After submitting the amended return, run “Lock as filed” again in Reports to save the new snapshot.
reports_consumption_tax_tax_free: You are configured as a tax-free entity (no consumption-tax filing required). The figures below are reference estimates of output tax only.
reports_consumption_tax_caveat: Estimates and method comparison only. Actual consumption-tax return .xtx export is supported for general taxation, the 20%-special-provision, and simplified taxation (single business category only, below); the 30%-special-provision is not yet supported. Confirm with your tax accountant or local tax office.
reports_consumption_tax_taxable_base: Taxable base (rounded down to the nearest 1,000 yen; basis for the filing-form estimate): {amount}
reports_consumption_tax_filing_caveat: The "filing-form equivalent" mimics the actual consumption tax return's rounding (taxable base rounded down to 1,000 yen, tax amounts rounded down to 100 yen). The "tax payable" column on the left is in whole yen for method comparison and can differ by a few hundred yen due to rounding.
reports_consumption_tax_settings_link: Save your filing method in Settings. The Reports view always shows all 4 methods side by side.
reports_interim_paid_national_label: Interim consumption tax paid this year (national portion)
reports_interim_paid_local_label: Interim local consumption tax paid this year (transfer tax portion)
reports_interim_paid_hint: If you made interim payments this year, enter the amount here. The annual .xtx credits it against the balance due (treated as 0 if left blank).
reports_interim_intro: If last year's confirmed national consumption tax exceeds ¥480,000, this year you're subject to interim filing. For the simplified installment method (予定申告), the tax office normally mails a pre-filled payment slip and no filing document is needed. Only the actual-results method (仮決算, computed from this period's real transactions) needs the .xtx export below.
reports_interim_no_obligation: Last year's confirmed tax was ¥480,000 or less, so there is no interim filing obligation.
reports_interim_installment_count: {n} interim filing(s) required this year (prorated amount under the installment method).
reports_interim_yotei_note: The table above uses the installment method (prorated from last year's confirmed amount). To compute from this period's actual results instead, choose the actual-results method: pick a period below and export the .xtx.
reports_interim_period_select_label: Period to export as an actual-results (仮決算) .xtx
reports_interim_kari_kessan_intro: Computes the same way as the annual return, but using only the selected period's actual transactions (SHINKOKU_KBN = interim).
reports_xtx_intro_html: Export this year's data as .xtx to load into e-Tax software (download edition). The tax return and blue-return financial statements are bundled in one file per the NTA official XSD. ⚠ Requires entering tax office, user ID, name, and address under Settings ＞ Filer Info first. The return carries the business income, profit, and blue-return special deduction (other deductions and tax are completed in e-Tax).
reports_xtx_unsupported_year: .xtx output for fiscal year {year} is not supported (only 2026 for now)
reports_xtx_filer_incomplete: Filer info is missing. Please enter tax office, user ID, name, and address under Settings ＞ Filer Info.
reports_xtx_download_reiwa7_hint: The Reiwa 8 e-Tax module is not yet available, so this exports with NENBUN=7 (Reiwa 7) for real-device import testing (the envelope structure is year-independent).
settings_filer_intro_html: Required to load the .xtx into e-Tax. Stored only on this device and excluded from backups by default.
settings_filer_zeimusho_placeholder: Search by name or code (e.g. Musashino / 01197)
settings_filer_zeimusho_invalid: Not a valid tax office code (5 digits)
backup_include_filer_info: Include filer info (user ID, name, address, tax office)
reports_lock_confirm_desc: Saves a snapshot of the current P/L and monthly sales, after which entries within {year} can no longer be reversed. Intended for use after e-Tax submission. You can undo with “Unlock”.
reports_unlock_confirm_desc: Clears the filed flag for {year} so entries can be reversed again. Intended as an administrative operation for amended returns.
settings_language_hint: Switch the UI language. The page will reload. Account names, ledger items, and .xtx output remain in Japanese.
settings_basic_intro_html: Business information that appears on the closing report, Form B, and the .xtx file.
settings_basic_real_estate_income_enable: Use real estate income (shows the business/real estate toggle on the journal form and real-estate fixed asset fields)
settings_basic_inventory_auto_valuation_: Auto-calculate ending inventory (most-recent-purchase-cost method). Turn off if you've elected a different valuation method with the NTA
settings_basic_skip_attachment_confirm: Skip the confirmation before attaching receipt photos (you can re-enable it here later)
settings_carryover_intro_html: Carries the prior year's asset and liability balances into this year as an opening transfer entry dated {year}-01-01. Owner withdrawals, owner contributions, and the prior net income are absorbed into the capital (元入金) account. Run once per fiscal year.
settings_carryover_already_exists: A carryover entry already exists. Delete it first.
settings_carryover_no_prior: No journal entries in the previous year — nothing to carry over
settings_subaccount_intro: Use these to distinguish bank accounts (e.g. Cash on hand / Mitsubishi UFJ) or fine-grained expenses (e.g. Telecom / AWS).
settings_subaccount_error_required: Please enter both the parent account and a name
settings_subaccount_error_duplicate: A subaccount with this name already exists
settings_vendor_intro: Registering an invoice registration number or default counterpart account makes auto-classification on CSV import more accurate.
settings_vendor_error_duplicate: A vendor with this name already exists
settings_inventory_item_intro: Tag an item and quantity on purchase/sales lines in the journal form to auto-calculate ending inventory (most-recent-purchase-cost method).
settings_inventory_item_error_duplicate: An item with this name already exists
settings_asset_intro: Equipment with an acquisition cost of 100,000 JPY or more should be registered as a fixed asset and expensed via depreciation (direct method). “Generate depreciation entries” at year-end creates the year's depreciation entries in bulk.
settings_asset_small_ineligible_cost: ⚠ Cost exceeds threshold (< {threshold} JPY); special rule not applicable
settings_asset_small_ineligible_expired: ⚠ Special rule expired after 2029-03-31; not applicable
settings_asset_error_required: Name and acquisition cost are required
settings_asset_error_life: Useful life must be 1 or greater
settings_asset_error_small_ineligible: Cannot register: does not meet small-asset special requirements
settings_asset_run_warn_small_cap: ⚠ {count} skipped due to small-asset annual cap (¥3M)
settings_asset_run_warn_small_ineligible: ⚠ {count} skipped: small-asset special rule not applicable
settings_asset_property_error_required: Property type, address, and annual rent are required
settings_asset_disposal_run_error_lump_s: ⚠ Lump-sum depreciation assets aren't supported for automatic disposal/sale entries (continue the 3-year straight write-off)
settings_asset_disposal_transfer_estimat: Reference capital-gain estimate (separate taxation, excluded from business income): proceeds {proceeds} − acquisition expense {acquisitionExpense} = estimate {estimate} (held ~{years} years)
settings_rule_intro: On CSV import, match description strings and auto-fill the counterpart account. Higher-priority rules are evaluated first.
settings_rule_error_required: Pattern and counterpart account are required
settings_account_intro: Hiding accounts you don't use shortens the picker in the journal-entry form. The accounts themselves are not deleted from the records.
settings_llm_intro_html: If you provide a Google Gemini API key, rows that fail to match any rule during CSV import can be auto-classified by an LLM. BYOK: the key is stored only in your browser and sent directly to the Google API (it never passes through aoiko). You can obtain one for free at Google AI Studio.
settings_tesseract_intro_html:
Images never leave your device. No LLM used. Tesseract (WASM) OCR text is parsed by deterministic rules for T+13-digit invoice registration numbers, dates, and totals. Vendor and items are not guessed; always verify the total and date manually.
On first use, jpn.traineddata / eng.traineddata are fetched from the default CDN (cached afterwards). For fully offline use, set langPath below to your self-hosted URL.
settings_tesseract_langpath_label: traineddata source (optional; blank = tesseract.js default CDN)
settings_openai_intro_html: Use local AI such as Ollama / LM Studio / llama.cpp. OCR requires a vision-capable model (llama3.2-vision, qwen2-vl, minicpm-v, etc.); LLM classification works with a text model. Ollama works only with the locally-run build (an HTTPS-hosted build cannot reach localhost) and requires setting `OLLAMA_ORIGINS`.
settings_accountant_export_intro: Export {year} journal entries to hand off to your tax accountant. The Yayoi-format file is Shift-JIS/CRLF and can be read by most Japanese accounting software (Yayoi, freee, Money Forward, etc.) via their "Yayoi format import" option.
settings_accountant_export_disclaimer: Tax category codes are inferred by this app and are not an officially guaranteed spec. Please have your accountant verify reduced-rate, invoice-deduction-rate, and simplified-taxation business-category values before importing.
settings_qualified_book_intro_html: The ¥750,000 blue-return deduction (from 令和 9 = 2027 returns) requires e-Tax submission and storage as a qualified e-bookkeeping system. Current aoiko coverage:
settings_qualified_book_req1_status: ✓ Reversing entries retain originals as status=reversed (never deleted)
settings_qualified_book_req2_status: ✓ Journal lines reference subaccounts, vendors, and chart of accounts
settings_qualified_book_req3: Search by date / amount / vendor (combinations + ranges)
settings_qualified_book_req3_status: △ Date, amount range, and description are searchable in the journal list; vendor search lives in the Reports breakdown
settings_qualified_book_req4_status: ⚠ Out of scope (receipt OCR aids journal entry creation only; original documents and electronic-transaction records must be managed separately)
settings_qualified_book_caveat_html: Receiving the ¥750k deduction also requires filing the “Notification of qualified electronic bookkeeping” with the tax office in advance. See the NTA dedicated site.
settings_consumption_tax_intro: Choose the consumption-tax filing method if you are a taxable entity. aoiko does not output the actual tax return forms (post-table 2-3 etc.); it only provides estimates and comparisons.
settings_consumption_tax_attribution_met: Deduction method when taxable-sales ratio is under 95%
settings_consumption_tax_attribution_hin: Not used when taxable sales are ¥500M or less and the taxable-sales ratio is 95% or more (full deduction applies instead).
settings_restore_intro_html: Fully restores from a backup JSON file. All current data will be deleted.
settings_restore_success: Restored {tables} tables / {rows} rows. Please reload the page.
settings_restore_missing_blobs: {count} receipt photo(s) had no image data, so they were restored empty.
settings_data_intro: Delete all data in the local IndexedDB. Backup files are not affected.
settings_clear_confirm_desc: All data in IndexedDB — journal entries, vendors, fixed assets, settings, etc. — will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone. Files inside the backup folder will not be deleted.
settings_disposal_clear_confirm_desc: Clear the disposal/sale record for "{name}" (the asset itself will not be deleted). This cannot be undone.
settings_restore_confirm_desc: All current data will be deleted and fully replaced with the contents of the selected JSON. This cannot be undone.
opening_intro: Set up the journal entries and fixed-asset registrations you need at business opening, all in one place.
opening_expense_intro: Expenses paid before opening to prepare the business (business cards, advertising, supplies, etc.). Items worth ¥100,000 or more go under "Converted assets" below.
opening_expense_amortize_five_year: Amortize over 5 years (books year 1's portion only)
opening_converted_title: Converted assets (bought before opening, used from opening onward)
opening_converted_intro: Automatically calculates the depreciated book value as of your opening date, after subtracting depreciation for the private-use period.
opening_converted_basis_result: Private-use period depreciation {nonBusiness} / Opening book value {basis}
opening_gray_area_warning: ⚠ Whether this special provision applies to converted assets is not clearly established by official guidance. Please confirm with a tax accountant before filing. This choice can be corrected later via a reversing entry.
opening_inventory_hint: If you already have inventory purchased before opening, register it via "Custom items" below using an inventory account.
opening_deposit_hint: If you paid a deposit for rented office space, register it via "Custom items" below using the appropriate account.
opening_preview_title: The following entries and fixed assets will be created
opening_done_message: Opening entries and fixed assets have been created.
opening_entry_intro: Register pre-opening expenses, converted assets, and more, all in one place.
reports_xtx_intro_white_html: Export this year's data as .xtx and import it into the e-Tax software (download edition). The final tax return and the income/expense breakdown statement (general, white return) are bundled into one file per the National Tax Agency's official XSD. ⚠ You must first fill in Tax office / Taxpayer ID / Name / Address under Settings > Filer info. The return includes business revenue and income (the family-employee deduction, other deductions, and tax due must be completed in e-Tax).
settings_filing_type_confirm_to_white: Switching to white return. The blue-return special deduction will no longer apply, and .xtx export will bundle the income/expense breakdown statement (general).
settings_filing_type_confirm_to_blue: Switching to blue return. .xtx export will bundle the blue-return financial statement (general).
settings_asset_lump_sum_eligible: ✓ Cost is within 100,000–199,999 JPY (3-year even split)
settings_asset_lump_sum_ineligible: ⚠ Lump-sum depreciable assets require a cost of 100,000–199,999 JPY
settings_asset_error_lump_sum_ineligible: Cannot register: does not meet lump-sum asset requirements (100,000–199,999 JPY)
reports_consumption_tax_xtx_unsupported_: Year {year} is outside the 2%-special-provision period (Oct 2023 – Sep 2026), so .xtx export is unavailable
reports_consumption_tax_xtx_two_wari_int: Export the consumption tax return (simplified-taxation form) + attachment 6 for the 20% special provision as .xtx, per the NTA official XSD (verify the real import into e-Tax software yourself). Sales returns/discounts are already netted into the taxable base, so attachment 6 won't show them as a separate line — the final tax amount is still correct.
reports_consumption_tax_xtx_simplified_i: Export the consumption tax return + attachments 4-3 and 5-3 for simplified taxation (single business category) as .xtx, per the NTA official XSD (verify the real import into e-Tax software yourself). Apportionment across multiple business categories (the 75% rule etc.) is not supported.
reports_consumption_tax_xtx_general_intr: Export the consumption tax return (general form) + attachments 1-3 and 2-3 for general taxation as .xtx, per the NTA official XSD (verify the real import into e-Tax software yourself). aoiko assumes a 100% taxable-sales ratio (all sales are taxable asset transfers), so non-taxable sales, export exemptions, etc. are not supported.
income_deductions_intro: Estimates the tax return's "income deductions" and "tax calculation" sections. For items with complex individual circumstances (casualty loss deduction, mortgage tax credit, foreign tax credit, etc.), enter the final confirmed amount from the NTA/e-Tax or your accountant directly.
income_deductions_other_income_intro: Enter this if you have income besides business income, such as a side job or a pension (optional).
income_deductions_salary_checkbox: I have salary income (enter the details from your withholding slip)
income_deductions_public_pension_hint: This depends on age, pension amount, and other income via a bracket table, so enter the final amount from the NTA's worksheet.
income_deductions_real_estate_intro: The real estate income (KOA220/KOA130) profit/loss is calculated automatically from journal entries recorded with the business/real estate toggle. Only enter the fields needed for the blue-return deduction and loss offsetting here.
income_deductions_real_estate_land_loan_: Interest on debt incurred to acquire land
When real estate income is a loss, the portion equal to this amount cannot be offset against other income (entered as a final confirmed amount, no apportionment calculation)
income_deductions_small_business_mutual_: Small business mutual aid contributions paid
income_deductions_old_long_term_insuranc: Transitional measure (old long-term casualty insurance) premiums paid
income_deductions_casualty_loss_hint: Losses from disaster/theft are complex to calculate — enter the final confirmed amount (see the NTA's worksheet).
income_deductions_credits_hint: Mortgage tax credit / foreign tax credit etc. require complex calculations including classification codes. Only the final amount is reflected here — complete the classification codes in e-Tax yourself.
income_deductions_housing_renovation_cre: Housing seismic renovation special tax credit, etc.
income_deductions_result_final_tax: Income tax + special reconstruction income tax
